calendar.matters:
Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC'S unopposed Motion To Enforce Settlement is granted.

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
